# SadaPOS

Point of sale software by sadapos is free and premium offline and cloud based pos system designed for retailers in Pakistan. 

## Key Features
- Offline-First Architecture (Works 24/7 without internet)
- Auto Cloud Sync
- IMEI & Serials Tracking (Ideal for mobile shops)
- Smart Stock & Inventory Management
- Customer & Supplier Ledgers
- Warranty & Repair Tracking

## Links
- Website: https://www.sadapos.com
- App: https://app.sadapos.com
